Test Case Procedure:
1. Login as Admin
2. Go to /admin/assign
3. Select Role (Staff/Shipper)
4. Enter Name and unique Email
5. Click 'Assign'
Expected Results:
- System displays 'Assign success'
- Record created with default pass 'FreshFood123'
- Email marked as Verified
- Notification email sent

Test Case Procedure:
1. Enter an email already used by a customer
2. Click 'Assign'
Expected Results:
- System displays error: Email already used
- No new record created

Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to /admin/users
2. Locate user
3. Click 'Ban/Unban' button
4. Verify status in list
Expected Results:
- Status toggled in DB
- List shows new status
- Banned user cannot login

Test Case Procedure:
1. Find own account or another Admin in list
2. Attempt to Ban or Change Role
3. Click Save
Expected Results:
- System displays protection error
- Admin account remains unchanged

Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to /admin/edit
2. Change Role (e.g., Staff to Manager)
3. Click Save
4. Check user email
Expected Results:
- Role updated in DB
- Success email sent to user
- Redirect to list with success msg
